findings.description: The knowledge file adds '**クラス**: `nablarch.core.db.connection.SimpleDbTransactionManager`' but this fully-qualified class name does not appear in the source file. The source only says 'SimpleDbTransactionManagerの設定' without any package path.
findings.source_evidence: Source section a) heading: '\a) SimpleDbTransactionManagerの設定' — no package name present anywhere in the source for this class.

findings.description: 'BasicStatementFactory' (nablarch.core.db.statement.BasicStatementFactory) is mentioned in source section b) as the sample class for statementFactory but is absent from s1 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source section b) statementFactory: '本サンプルでは、「nablarch.core.db.statement.BasicStatementFactory」を設定している。'

findings.description: 'OracleDataSource' (oracle.jdbc.pool.OracleDataSource) is mentioned in source section b) as the sample DataSource implementation but is absent from s1 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source section b) dataSource: '本サンプルでは、「oracle.jdbc.pool.OracleDataSource」を設定し、OracleDataSourceのproperyに必要な情報を設定している。'

findings.description: 'WLInitialContextFactory' (weblogic.jndi.WLInitialContextFactory) appears in the JNDI XML example in the source but is absent from s2 hints.
'sqlStatementExceptionFactory' appears as a property in the JNDI XML example in the source but is absent from s2 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source XML: '<property name="sqlStatementExceptionFactory">...</property>' inside the statementFactory component.
